name: Applesauce Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, cream shortening and sugar until creamy.
3. Stir in egg, then applesauce. Blend in the remaining ingredients except walnut halves.
4. Spread mixture into an 8-inch square non-stick baking dish.
5. Place walnut halves on top of dough.
6. Bake for 40 minutes, or until firm to the touch.
7. Cool in pan; cut into nine squares.
